ROADMAP

Q4 2024

Foundation & Initial Launches
  • VolarianHeist Launch
  • Interchain Closed-Testnet
  • EmpyreanNights Closed-Beta
  • $VOLS Launch & Distribution
  • CEX Listing
  • DEX Listing

Q1 2025

Mainnet & Feature Enchancements
  • Interchain Testnet + Mainnet
  • CEX + DEX Listings more Chains
  • Interchain functions for our games
  • EmpyreanNights Open-Beta
  • $VOLS Ecosystem Fees

Q2 2025

External
Adoption
  • Interchain External Adoption
  • $VOLS Voting
  • Green Initiatives
  • Security Enhancements
  • Ambassador Program
  • VolarianHeist Upgrade

Q3 2025 & Beyond

Growth & Innovation
Tech Advancements
  • Cross-chain marketplace for seamless asset trading
  • Increase Interchain Networks
  • EmpyreanNights Launch
Expansion & Partnerships
  • Developer Grants Program
  • Increase Global Awareness
  • Key Strategic Partners

The Architects of Dreams

The Masterminds Behind Volaris Games. Each a champion in their field

  • Game Master Shaun Sung

    Co-Founder & CEO

    Shaun brings a wealth of knowledge and experience, blending his expertise in blockchain, AI, and the Web3 ecosystem to drive the vision and strategy. His diverse background in metaverse development, educational innovation, and strategic advisory roles positions him uniquely to lead Volaris Games into the forefront of Web3 gaming.

  • Architect Lucas Lu

    Chief Experience Officer

    Lucas combines creative expertise, strategic thinking, and Web3 expertise. He plays a crucial role in crafting seamless, engaging experiences that are both advanced and user-focused, ensuring every aspect is innovative and compelling for the growing community.

  • FXMedia: The Tech Alchemists

    AAA Tech Team

    Our tech team is powered by FXMedia. Since January 2008, FXMedia has solidify themselves as the industry leading experts in Augmented Reality/Virtual Reality/Mixed Reality, Immersive Interactive, Artificial Intelligence and IOT for corporate enterprises and government agencies.

  • Realm Connector Stephen G.

    Lead of Community & Partnership

    Stephen plays an essential role in fostering a vibrant community. His expertise in community building, combined with a strong background in business development, makes him an invaluable asset in forming strategic partnerships and driving player-centric engagement. 

  • Market Mage Johnson Crypto Boy

    Lead of Community & Research

    Johnson is crucial in ensuring that Volaris Games remains at the forefront of web3 gaming industry with his vital connection between our community and the internal research and development teams. He effectively bridges the gap between players' expectations and the company's innovation efforts.

Council of Wisdom

Our journey is supported by seasoned sages, visioneries, and collaborators.
